utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items with entries. Now check if each is fully specified per what should be covered: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, price, beds, baths, size, schools, taxes, insurance) — fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (mortgage amount, term, interest rate, monthly payment, fees, appraisal, equity used) — fully specified.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (legal fees, survey, total, timeline) — fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (cost, service type, timeline) — fully specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (connections cost, included services, timeline, deposits) — fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (purchase price, financing costs, legal/survey, moving, utility setup, total upfront costs, monthly mortgage, annual taxes, insurance) — fully specified.
All 6 requested items appear and are fully specified.
